title: Phunware Q4 2023 Earnings Call
text: Phunware, Inc. (NASDAQ: PHUN) Q4 2023 Earnings Call. Key Financial Results: Revenue & Margins: Net revenues from continuing operations: $4.8 million (down from $6.5 million in 2022). Gross margin: 34.9% (compared to 53.8% prior year). Operating Expenses: Operating expenses (excluding goodwill impairment): $21.6 million. Q4 2023 average monthly operating expense: approximately $1.1 million. Adjusted operating expense: $17.9 million. Bottom Line: Net loss from continuing operations: $41.9 million ($17.62 per share). Non-GAAP adjusted EBITDA loss: $15.5 million (25.5% improvement). Balance Sheet: Cash: $3.9 million at year-end; $17 million by early March 2024. Debt: $4.9 million at year-end; zero by early March 2024. Backlog and deferred revenue: $4.7 million. CEO Perspective: CEO Mike Snavely stated the company had reshaped nearly every aspect of the company to focus on predictable, sustainable and profitable growth. The reorganization included shutting down the Lyte Technologies hardware division in December 2023.
